evidence: "If you like action, you'll love this one!"
"If you enjoy raunchy comedies this is the one for you!"
"The plot is good - easy to follow."
"The plot is fun and easy to follow and her real life hubby in her movies is always something that I look for."
"This movie was all it's trumped up to be. Denzel Washington won an Oscar for his role. It was gritty and real with a twist."
"The makeup artists on this show should get an Oscar."
"It amazes me how well-directed the fight scenes were as well."
"I love Melissa McCarthy and love the constants that follow her through each film."
"Moana immerses you into the Pacific ocean and its many islands in the most intimate of ways."
"The angle that you watched the battle from as the viewer was perfect - you could almost FEEL the blows as the camera kept pace with Reeves."
"I cried several times while hearing Pacific Islanders speak with such pride and emotion about wanting their culture to be known and appreciated by others."

summary: The user has a strong preference for fast-paced action and comedy films, often enjoying well-produced content with emotional depth. They appreciate simple narratives and have a notable loyalty to specific actors, particularly Melissa McCarthy and Jason Bateman.
